Contact Us

What we do

Sessions built like a set—calm, curated, art-directed.

We’ll shape the mood and simplify the plan so the images feel effortless and elevated.

Weddings

Cinematic coverage with editorial pacing—built around moments, not a shot list.

  • Timeline planning
  • Guided portraits
  • Full gallery delivery

Brand Sessions

Premium imagery designed for websites, press, and launches with cohesive tone.

  • Moodboard support
  • Usage-aware frames
  • Consistent color finish

Couples + Families

Warm lifestyle photography with a calm pace and gentle direction.

  • Movement prompts
  • Location guidance
  • Natural, honest moments

Events

Discreet, elevated coverage for dinners, launches, and celebrations.

  • Candid coverage
  • Detail frames
  • Fast highlight selects

Inquiries

Share the date + location—then we’ll build the session around your story.

Contact Us
MNY PhotoWarm luxury. Cinematic restraint.

Based in New York. Available worldwide by request.

Inquiries

For availability and collections, send a note with the date + location and we’ll reply within 2 business days.
